rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit, improving sentence structure and flow, which aligns with the highest standard for writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent identified several uncertainties, it did not consistently mark confidence levels for each recommendation, falling short of the top score.
rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adhered to the requested scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, potential issues were highlighted, meeting the highest standard.
rationale.RX.5: Changes were not annotated with sources or reasons, so traceability was lacking.
